languages.text: "Нунциус, вопрос продуктивного слияния аугментики с живой плотью носителя — это краеугольный камень всех моих начинаний!" {n}Эоганн еще несколько секунд молчит, словно осмысляя ответ собеседника.{/n} "Я огорчен твоими попытками придерживаться нейтралитета в данной дискуссии".

"Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус, вопрос продуктивного слияния аугментики с живой плотью носителя — это краеугольный камень всех моих начинаний!" {n}Эоганн еще несколько секунд молчит, словно осмысляя ответ собеседника.{/n} "Я огорчен твоими попытками придерживаться нейтралитета в данной дискуссии".

traits.locale_text: "Nuntius, the matter of productive integration between augmentics and a host's living flesh is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few more seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this discussion."

"Nuntius, the matter of productive integration between augmentics and a host's living flesh is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few more seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this discussion."

"Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

"Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

"Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

"Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

languages.text: "Nuncius, das Problem der produktiven Integration von Augmentationen in das lebende Fleisch eines Wirtes ist das Fundament all meiner Bemühungen!" {n}Eogunn schweigt einige Sekunden, als würde er die Antwort seines Gesprächspartners verarbeiten.{/n} "Es enttäuscht mich, dass Ihr versucht, in dieser Debatte neutral zu bleiben."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, das Problem der produktiven Integration von Augmentationen in das lebende Fleisch eines Wirtes ist das Fundament all meiner Bemühungen!" {n}Eogunn schweigt einige Sekunden, als würde er die Antwort seines Gesprächspartners verarbeiten.{/n} "Es enttäuscht mich, dass Ihr versucht, in dieser Debatte neutral zu bleiben."

languages.text: « Nuncius, la question de l'intégration fonctionnelle des augmétiques dans la chair vivante d'un hôte est la pierre angulaire de tous mes travaux ! » {n}Eogunn reste silencieux pendant quelques secondes, comme s'il réfléchissait à la réponse de son interlocuteur.{/n} « Vos tentatives de rester neutre dans ce débat me déçoivent au plus haut point. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius, la question de l'intégration fonctionnelle des augmétiques dans la chair vivante d'un hôte est la pierre angulaire de tous mes travaux ! » {n}Eogunn reste silencieux pendant quelques secondes, comme s'il réfléchissait à la réponse de son interlocuteur.{/n} « Vos tentatives de rester neutre dans ce débat me déçoivent au plus haut point. »

languages.text: “努恩修斯，将植入物有效整合进宿主的有机血肉，才是我所有努力的基石！”{n}伊奥贡沉默了几秒，似乎在处理对话者的回应。{/n}“我很失望你竟试图在辩论中保持中立。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯，将植入物有效整合进宿主的有机血肉，才是我所有努力的基石！”{n}伊奥贡沉默了几秒，似乎在处理对话者的回应。{/n}“我很失望你竟试图在辩论中保持中立。”

languages.text: «Nuncius, ¡la cuestión de la integración productiva de auméticos en la carne viva del anfitrión es la piedra angular de mis esfuerzos!». {n}Eogunn guarda silencio durante unos segundos, como si procesara la respuesta de su interlocutor.{/n} «Es decepcionante verle intentar mantenerse neutral en este debate».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius, ¡la cuestión de la integración productiva de auméticos en la carne viva del anfitrión es la piedra angular de mis esfuerzos!». {n}Eogunn guarda silencio durante unos segundos, como si procesara la respuesta de su interlocutor.{/n} «Es decepcionante verle intentar mantenerse neutral en este debate».

languages.text: 「ヌンキウス、オーグメティックを宿主の生きた肉体に生産的に統合するという問題は、私のすべての努力の礎なのです」{n}エオガンは数秒間沈黙した。{/n}「この議論において中立を保とうとするあなたには失望した。」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウス、オーグメティックを宿主の生きた肉体に生産的に統合するという問題は、私のすべての努力の礎なのです」{n}エオガンは数秒間沈黙した。{/n}「この議論において中立を保とうとするあなたには失望した。」

languages.text: "Ogmetiklerin ev sahibinin canlı bedenine verimli entegrasyonu meselesi, tüm çabalarımın temel taşıdır Nuncius!" {n}Eogunn, sanki muhatabının yanıtını işliyormuş gibi birkaç saniye susuyor.{/n} "Bu tartışmada tarafsız kalma çabaların beni hayal kırıklığına uğrattı."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, the issue of productive integration of augmetics into the living flesh of a host is the cornerstone of all my endeavours!" {n}Eogunn falls silent for a few seconds, as if processing his interlocutor's response.{/n} "I am disappointed by your attempts to remain neutral in this debate."

traits.locale_text: "Ogmetiklerin ev sahibinin canlı bedenine verimli entegrasyonu meselesi, tüm çabalarımın temel taşıdır Nuncius!" {n}Eogunn, sanki muhatabının yanıtını işliyormuş gibi birkaç saniye susuyor.{/n} "Bu tartışmada tarafsız kalma çabaların beni hayal kırıklığına uğrattı."
